name: loop-harness
description: A stack-agnostic loop-engineering harness for any coding project (PowerShell/pwsh). /init-harness scaffolds the project layer and, if design docs already exist in docs/, distils VISION and STATE from them; otherwise it interviews you. Ships session-context, a deny-list guard, a Stop-gate on build/verify.ps1, maker/checker/explorer/verifier sub-agents, and per-stack verify templates. Agents are config, tools are code, nothing finishes without the gate. Includes harness-audit, claude-code-hook-facts, and verify-gate-authoring skills distilled from a Fable-5-led review of this same harness.
